checks.name: Dry run
checks.evidence: scripts/run_end_to_end.py supports --dry-run and returns a planned execution_summary without writing task artifacts.

checks.name: Rerun policy
checks.evidence: scripts/run_end_to_end.py supports --rerun-policy new_ids, skip_completed and force.

checks.name: Skip completed
checks.evidence: workflow-002 decision_summary.yaml shows validation, dispatch and review under execution_summary.skipped after skip_completed rerun.

checks.name: Retry plan
checks.evidence: tests/test_run_end_to_end.py covers retry_required when validation fails, and the successful workflow-002 decision_summary.yaml reports not_required.

checks.name: Decision summary groups
checks.evidence: decision_summary.yaml explicitly separates execution_summary.completed, skipped, failed and next.

checks.name: Reusable workflow inputs
checks.evidence: scripts/run_local_task.py derives dispatch/review input paths from the current parent task id instead of hardcoding workflow-001.
